name: @flashcat/trading-agents-workflow
description: OpenClaw native trading agents workflow layer with registry-driven platform routing, workflow-native schedules, SQLite state, Telegram outbox, protocol objects, mTLS-gated trade intents, and trading_core receipts.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/workflow.js && node --check src/control-loop-budget.js && node --check src/console/sqlite.js && node --check src/console/read-model.js && node --check src/console/action-gateway.js && node --check src/console/server.js && node --check bin/cat-meeting-governance.mjs && node --check bin/workflow-console.mjs && node --check scripts/workflow_regression_tests.mjs && node --check scripts/workflow_trading_core_contract_smoke.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/trading_agents_workflow_mcp.py scripts/trading_agents_workflow_hermes_mcp.py scripts/test_hermes_mcp_surface.py
